pr_text:
## Title: Fix uninitialized EMM-SAP primitive memory in NAS UE lower layer

### Summary
The NAS UE lower layer functions were passing uninitialized stack memory to the EMM-SAP interface, causing undefined behavior. The `emm_sap_t` primitives in `lowerlayer_success()`, `lowerlayer_failure()`, and `lowerlayer_release()` were allocated on the stack without zero-initialization before field assignment. This allowed garbage values in padding bytes and unused struct members to be interpreted as flags/b
